instruction: There's a scratch line on the gift box. Remove it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="gift" data-source="heroicons/outline/gift.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M20.625 11.505v8.25a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H4.875a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5-1.5v-8.25m8.25-6.375A2.625 2.625 0 1 0 9 7.755h2.625m0-2.625v2.625m0-2.625a2.625 2.625 0 1 1 2.625 2.625h-2.625m0 0v13.5M3 11.505h18c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.622-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3c-.621 0-1.125.503-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125Z"/></g>
  <circle id="bow-left" fill="#e63946" cx="56" cy="36" r="4" />
  <circle id="bow-right" fill="#e63946" cx="72" cy="36" r="4" />
  <circle id="bow-knot" fill="#fde047" cx="64" cy="36" r="2" />
  <line id="scratch" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x1="30" y1="50" x2="50" y2="60" />
</svg>
